findings.reason: The word วิธี is pronounced 'wí-thii' (high, mid). Therefore, หลายวิธี should be rising, high, mid.
The word แห่ง has a high-class initial consonant (ห) with a mai ek tone mark, which produces a low tone.
The word อย่าง has a mid-class initial consonant (อ) leading a low-class consonant (ย) with a mai ek tone mark, which produces a low tone.
The syllable ธิ has a low-class initial consonant (ธ) with a short vowel and no final consonant, which produces a high tone.

findings.thai: ออกกำลังกาย
findings.reason: The syllable กาย has a mid-class initial consonant (ก) with a long vowel and a sonorant final, which produces a mid tone.
The loanword ออฟฟิศ is pronounced with high tones on both syllables (ɔ́ɔp-fít).
The loanword ออฟฟิศ is pronounced with high tones on both syllables (ɔ́ɔp-fít).
The loanword ออฟฟิศ is pronounced with high tones on both syllables (ɔ́ɔp-fít).
The word สมัคร is pronounced 'sà-màk' (low, low) because the high-class ส leads the low-class ม, applying high-class tone rules to the dead syllable มัคร.

findings.thai: อาหารเชียงใหม่
findings.reason: The word ใหม่ has a high-class leading consonant (ห) with a mai ek tone mark, which produces a low tone.
The word อีเมล consists of only two syllables, both of which have a mid tone.
The word เอกสาร consists of three syllables (èek-gà-sǎan) with tones low, low, rising.
The loanword แอป is pronounced with a high tone in colloquial Thai.
